_setup_instructions: 2. Send /newbot and follow instructions to create a bot
3. Copy the bot token and paste it here
4. Start a chat with your bot, then visit:
5. Send a message to your bot, refresh the page,
and copy your chat_id from the response

push_notifications._note: Uses MT5 built-in push notifications to mobile app

email._note: Configure email in MT5 Terminal -> Tools -> Options -> Email
